title: Peaceful Moon
description: This add-on for Enhanced Celestials adds a peaceful moon. Because sometimes you just need a night off.
body:
![Peaceful Moon header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17b88a34b9c58ecbf1837c4cd36376177736acbb.png)
The Peaceful Moon mod adds a moon to Enhanced Celestials that prevents new hostile mobs from spawning that night. Sometimes you just need a break. The moon does not set the difficulty to peaceful so existing named hostiles won't disappear.

This mod does not contain a separate Super Moon

 All credit for [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials) goes to Corgi Taco

Join [my Discord](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)!
